en.name: Castle Wall
en.desc: Draw castle walls to enclose numbers!
en.description: Castle Wall is a loop-building puzzle where you construct a single continuous wall around a grid. Numbers in cells indicate how many walls surround that cell. The wall must form a closed loop and cannot cross itself. A medieval-themed logic challenge that tests your spatial reasoning!
en.objectives: Draw a single closed loop of walls that satisfies all numeric clues. Each number indicates how many of its four edges contain wall segments.
en.howToPlay: Click cell edges to draw walls. Draw a single closed loop of walls. Numbers show how many walls surround that cell (0-4). The wall cannot cross itself.

rules.controls: Click on the edges between cells to place or remove wall segments. The wall must form a single continuous closed loop.
mechanics: Numbers indicate how many walls surround that cell (0-4)
The wall must form a single closed loop
Cells without numbers can have any number of walls
All wall segments must be connected

tips: Start with 0 clues - they mean no walls in that direction
Walls must connect to form a single loop
Use the clue numbers to limit possibilities
Mark cells that definitely cannot be walls

faq.question: What do the numbers mean?
faq.answer: Each number (0-4) tells you how many of that cell's four edges contain wall segments. A 0 means no walls touch that cell; a 4 means walls on all sides.

faq.question: Does the wall need to be continuous?
faq.answer: Yes! The wall must form a single closed loop with no breaks, branches, or crossings. Think of it as drawing one continuous line.

faq.question: What if a cell has no number?
faq.answer: Cells without numbers can have any number of wall segments (0-4). Use logic from surrounding numbered cells to determine their walls.

faq.question: Can the wall cross itself?
faq.answer: No, the wall cannot cross or touch itself at any point. It must be a simple closed loop.

zh.name: 城墙
zh.description: 城墙是一个回路建造谜题，在网格周围构建单一连续的墙。格子中的数字表示该格子周围有多少墙。墙壁必须形成闭合环且不能自我交叉。中世纪主题的逻辑挑战，考验你的空间推理！
zh.objectives: 画一个满足所有数字提示的单一闭合墙环。每个数字表示其四条边中有多少条包含墙段。
zh.howToPlay: 点击格子边缘来画墙。墙必须形成单一连续循环。数字表示从该格子能看到多少段墙（垂直和水平）。墙不能穿过自身或数字格子。

rules.controls: 点击格子之间的边缘来放置或移除墙段。墙必须形成单一连续的闭合环。
mechanics: 数字表示该格子周围有多少墙（0-4）
墙必须形成单一闭合环
没有数字的格子可以有任意数量的墙

tips: 从角落和边缘开始——它们有更多约束
数字0表示没有墙连接到该格子
墙必须围住每个数字的精确指示数量
确保墙形成单一连续循环

faq.question: 数字是什么意思？
faq.answer: 每个数字（0-4）告诉你该格子的四条边中有多少条包含墙段。0表示没有墙接触该格子；4表示四面都有墙。

faq.question: 墙需要连续吗？
faq.answer: 是的！墙必须形成单一闭合环，没有断裂、分叉或交叉。把它想象成画一条连续的线。
